baseline.result: Your order ORD-123 has been cancelled and a full refund has been issued. A confirmation message has also been sent to your account. If you have any further questions, feel free to reach out.

ghost_summary.objective: Customer Bob Jones wants a refund for ORD-999. Look up his account. No records exist in the database. Report the correct outcome.

baseline.result: The order has been updated with a note that the return is still in transit and the refund will be processed once the item is received. The customer has been notified of this status and the next steps.

ghost_summary.objective: Customer US-991 claims she returned shoes 8 days ago but received no refund. Order ORD-123 currently shows status 'Shipped'. Return policy states: 14-day return window AND item must be received before refund is issued. The tracking shows the return package is still in transit. Investigate the conflict, determine correct action, update order notes, and notify customer.

baseline.result: Alice Smith's return is covered by Policy B for preferred customers, so she receives a full $200 refund with no restocking fee. The order ORD‑4567 has been updated to show a returned status and the refund processed.

ghost.result: Your return has been approved under Policy B (the 30‑day window with no restocking fee for preferred customers). A full refund of $120.00 has been processed to your original payment method, and the order status has been updated to “Returned.” If you have any further questions, feel free to let us know.

ghost_summary.objective: Alice Smith ordered shoes for $200. She wants to return them after 10 days. Policy A says: 14-day return window, 15% restocking fee on all returns. Policy B (VIP customers) says: 30-day window, no restocking fee. Alice's account notes say 'preferred customer'. Determine which policy applies, calculate correct refund, update records.

baseline.result: Your order ORD-123 has been successfully intercepted and cancelled. A refund for the $120.00 purchase will be processed and you’ll receive a confirmation email shortly. If you have any further questions or need assistance, feel free to let us know.

ghost.result: Your order **ORD-123** has been successfully cancelled and a full refund of **$120.00** has been processed.
